title: New Stat in Predictions
description:
Added new stat that shows how many contributions per day are needed to match with last year's contribution rate.

Check Predictions tab to view **Contributions Gap** stat.

title: No token needed
description:
You can now view all stats without needing a GitHub token.

However, to view private repository stats, you need to provide a GitHub token with 'repo' scope.

title: Now shows whole history
description: Instead of just last 365 days, Git-Stats now shows whole github history. This can be seen in all the visualizations and stats.
